subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the ocean of My knowledge and gazeth upon the luminary in the horizon of My proof! [3.5s]... ...If, occasionally, in accordance with the exigencies of God's consummate wisdom, an untoward incident should befall the friends, it would undoubtedly serve as a means whereby divine gifts
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الطائف حول بحر عرفانی و الناظر الی نیر افق برهانی... اگر گاهی بمقتضای حکمت بالغهٴ الهی امری منافی ظاهر شود البته آن سبب ظهور نعمتهای ربانی
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom
